<?php namespace Knuckles\Scribe\Extracting\Strategies\BodyParameters; use Knuckles\Scribe\Attributes\BodyParam; use Knuckles\Scribe\Extracting\Strategies\GetParamsFromAttributeStrategy; /** * @extends GetParamsFromAttributeStrategy<BodyParam> */ class GetFromBodyParamAttribute extends GetParamsFromAttributeStrategy { protected static array $attributeNames = [BodyParam::class]; }
